creator: bz@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Sun, 11 May 2008, vwe@FreeBSD.org wrote:

> Synopsis: trustedbsd-audit email list not archiving
>
> reassign for tracking as requested by Robert - will be fixed soon

It would be really nice if that would happen. I tried multiple times
before with various hats and failed and mostly given up because I
build my own archive atm being subscribed.

-- 
Bjoern A. Zeeb              Stop bit received. Insert coin for new game.
